## Rule

Cite the 2024 PHB / DMG / MM (chapter, page), errata, or Sage Advice that describes the correct behavior.

## What the engine does today

A failing test or a short script demonstrating the current behavior.

```ts
// repro here
```

## What it should do

Expected behavior per the cited rules.

## Notes

If the rules text is genuinely ambiguous, say so. Ambiguous rules are candidates for the `CustomEffect` escape hatch, not the core engine.
